_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: MRF is a fast MR sequence that can characterize and distinguish critical types of brain and tumor tissue in children with brain tumors, requiring only a fraction of the time spent on conventional MR imaging.
details: MRF is a fast MR sequence requiring only a fraction of the time spent on conventional MR imaging and may reduce the need for sedation in pediatric cases
